title: Tadej Pogačar Has to Try Twice to Make it Stick at Tour de Romandie
content:
Pogačar takes GC lead on first full road stage of Tour de Romandie, but he didn't have it all his own way.

Read the full article at Tadej Pogačar Has to Try Twice to Make it Stick at Tour de Romandie on Velo.
author: Jim Cotton
